title: Industrial CX Service Telemetry - Simulated
description: Simulated Grafana dashboard design artifact. It references local synthetic Influx line protocol only and is not connected to real Ducati, plant, dealer, InfluxDB, Grafana, OPC UA, MQTT, cloud, or edge infrastructure.

list.name: Simulation boundary
list.text: Portfolio simulation only; no real industrial telemetry integration.

targets.query: from(bucket: "industrial_cx_sim") |> range(start: -6h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "industrial_service_telemetry" and r._field == "temperature_c")
from(bucket: "industrial_cx_sim") |> range(start: -6h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "industrial_service_telemetry" and r._field == "vibration_mm_s")
from(bucket: "industrial_cx_sim") |> range(start: -6h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "industrial_service_telemetry" and r._field == "service_escalation_label") |> sum()
from(bucket: "industrial_cx_sim") |> range(start: -6h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "industrial_service_telemetry" and r._field == "pressure_bar")
